title.en: The attitude of the Holy Sea Realm Lord was ver...

content.en:
"Make a vow!"

Ye Tian hesitated for a moment, the oath he made by the Holy Sea Realm Lord was the Origin Test of the Extradimensional Rules, once he violated the test, no matter how much he copied his body, it would be useless, and he would be severely damaged, resulting in the inability to break through in the future and fall with heavy damage.

Therefore, such a vow cannot be made casually, unless you are really willing to keep the oath agreement.

"If Your Excellency is unwilling, I will not be able to pass on the wisdom of the Kasa Leaf to you!"

The attitude of the Holy Sea Realm Lord was very firm.

But Ye Tian was not used to the Holy Sea Realm Lord, "Holy Sea Realm Lord, if you don't give me the inheritance, you will be exposed immediately, and you will definitely fall when the time comes." Why don't you pass it on to me, and I'll find a way to take you away, how about it?"

"How are you going to take me away?"

The Holy Sea Realm Lord didn't believe it.

He couldn't even avoid the Fourth Realm, and the "Seven One Zero" Extradimensional Realm in the middle of the Third Realm still dared to say that he would take him away?

Then.

Ye Tian said, "Holy Sea Realm Lord, you should have heard of the Great Realm Armor Technique, right?"

"Great Realm Armor Technique, I've naturally heard of it, what's wrong?"

The Holy Sea Realm Lord didn't understand what Ye Tian meant.

I saw that the aura of the third-layer Great Realm Armor Technique appeared on Ye Tian's body, and he had obviously practiced the Great Realm Armor Technique of the third-layer realm.

"What, you have practiced the third-level Great Realm Armor Technique, could it be that you are from the Heavenly Armor Clan?"

The Holy Sea Realm Lord was shocked.

Ye Tian didn't answer, but said, "With my third-layer Great Realm Armor Technique, even if it is the existence of the fourth realm, it will not be able to track you. "

The Holy Sea Realm Lord shook his head, "It's useless, you can't leave the Ice Flame Realm!"

Ye Tian smiled and said, "After a long time, the Fourth Realm will not find your traces, and it will inevitably destroy the Ice Flame Realm, and when the time comes, I can arrange for one of my clones to escape, and that clone will seal a fake inheritance with the Third Layer Great Realm Armor Technique." With the seal of the third layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique, if the fourth realm is not forcibly destroyed, it will only catch my clone, break the seal, and take out the inheritance. And then we have time to leave. After all, they have locked down my clone to be you, so naturally they won't stop other extradimensional realms. "

"This ......"

The Holy Sea Realm Lord hesitated.

This approach may seem feasible, but it also carries certain risks.

"Holy Sea Realm Lord, you have no other choice but to cooperate with me!"

Ye Tian said.

"Okay!" the Holy Sea Realm Lord agreed, "but can you guarantee that you will strictly follow this?"

"I can make a vow!"

In order to reassure the Holy Sea Realm Lord, Ye Tian used the Extradimensional Origin Oath to make him believe.

And the Holy Sea Realm Lord really believed it.

Next, Ye Tian made an oath, and the Holy Sea Realm Lord also made an oath, so that they could not pit each other.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian let his other copy body come over, and he actually copied another extradimensional realm body.

Then.

The Holy Sea Realm Lord began to create a fake Ka Ye wisdom body inheritance, that is, to intercept a wisp of breath from the original inheritance, and then create a fake inheritance, and then let Ye Tian's copy body contain the extradimensional realm in the body, and then cast the third layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique to turn into a seal, compressing the inheritance into a sealing ball and sealing it inside.

The existence of the Fourth Realm can peek through the extradimensional realm in his body, as well as discover the sealing ball that he deliberately left a flaw.

In this way, those Fourth Realms could be convinced that this replica body was the disguise of the Holy Sea Realm Lord.

"Holy Sea Realm Lord, next, you will stay in the extradimensional realm in my body!"

Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

The Holy Sea Realm Lord agreed.

After that, the Holy Sea Realm Lord passed on the wisdom of the Ka Ye Domain to Ye Tian.

There was a terrifying aura on it, even if it was very weak, but it was many times more terrifying than those Fourth Realm beings he had ever seen.

"There is a high probability that it is the skin of the fifth realm extradimensional creature!" Ye Tian guessed.

However, the dead Fifth Realm, there is no threat to its skin.

Subsequently, he immediately accepted the inheritance and obtained the first layer of the Kasa wisdom body.

"There are three layers of inheritance in the Ka Ye wisdom body, and you only have two layers, and you must practice the first layer before you can see the second layer of content?"

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

"Your Excellency, I can't help it, the inheritance of the innate multi-dimensional Dao body is like this, anyway, I can't know the content of the second layer!" The Holy Sea Realm Lord said helplessly.

Therefore, if you don't inherit the original, you can only get the more incomplete first layer.

Of course, even if it is the first layer of content, it is an unimaginable value, far beyond the Black Mist Multidimensional Inheritance.

Ye Tian put away the inheritance and didn't ask any more, although he couldn't see the content of the second layer, but the inheritance was originally still in his hands, and he would be able to see the content of the second layer if he practiced the first layer of the Jiaye wisdom body in the future.

In the following days, the Holy Sea Realm Lord hid in the Extradimensional Realm in Ye Tian's body, so it was impossible for other Extradimensional Realms to find the Holy Sea Realm Lord.

Little by little, time passed.

And as time passed, the Fourth Realm of the outside world began to get impatient.

And Ye Tian was also trying to cultivate the wisdom body of the Ka Ye, but without the Ka Ye Wisdom Ye, he tried many times, and he fell and died every time.

"It seems that without the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf, it is impossible to practice the Ka Ye Wisdom Body at all!"

Ye Tian was very helpless.

But at this time, if you want to buy the wisdom leaf of the Ka leaf, can you buy it?

Subsequently.

His other replica bodies tried to buy the Wisdom Leaf in the Five Thousand Realm, and the result was obvious, the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce and other forces have stopped selling the Wisdom Leaf at present, which is also the order of the Fourth Realm.

"There's no way, I can only slowly figure out a way in the future!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the blink of an hour of 2.8, ten extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

The Fourth Realm finally can't wait.

"Destroy the Realm of Ice and Fire!"

Rumble!!!!!

The power of the Fourth Realm seemed to turn into a hand, pinching this vast Ice Flame Realm.

Click!!!!

An extradimensional realm was crushed by their fourth realm, and the power they used was well controlled, unable to kill the existence of the third realm, but able to injure the third realm.

Rumble!!!!

In the realm of ice and flame, countless creatures have fallen.

In fact, they have already notified them in advance, if there were really the heirs or descendants of the big people, they would have jumped out a long time ago, and they would not wait until now to die.

So, this time it is almost impossible to offend the inexplicable strong.
